payload.answer: There is a conflict: the existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. Safe actions available are: approve_supersession, keep_both, reject_new, or edit.

entity_resolution.reason: The existing memory and new input both refer to Sara, but describe incompatible family relationships: daughter versus niece. The system should not assume one replaces the other without user confirmation.

details: No durable memory change was committed.
Conflict requires one of the backend-supplied safe actions.
